examples: His old dreams had been so pleasant; but this reality was so dreary!
Sunshine had come again into the blind woman's life, and made her days less dark and dreary.
The house looked grim and dreary in the rain.
Duffield and Bhusri met at a Truckee, California diner on a dreary February day.
Dreary stadiums they don't own and stalling businesses eager to rake in more cash.
